description: A vessel has arrived early and there is no berth available. The VTS operator must direct it to an anchorage spot.

nodes.task_description: Communicate with the vessel master to confirm their ETA and that no berth is yet available.

expected_outcome.value: VTS operator informs the vessel they will need to anchor.

nodes.task_description: Check the anchorage chart for an available and suitable spot based on vessel size and draft.

expected_outcome.value: Operator identifies Anchorage B2 as available.

nodes.task_description: Instruct the vessel to proceed to the designated anchorage spot and report when they are 'at anchor'.

expected_outcome.value: The vessel is guided to the anchorage, and its status is updated in the VTS system once anchored.
